replies.msg:
From reddit:

Much like AC in terms of the open world, map filled with points of interest. According to him he has dozens of side quets and more than a hundred collectibles and exploitable, he even leaves the tiring exploration and the game bloated like the ACs, one of the game's only flaws.

I found combat to be a happy medium between the new Assassin's Creeds (but better) and Nioh. The game requires precise parrys and is very punitive for mistakes, I really liked the combat, I believe it is a major strength. There is no level system on enemies.

Stealth remembers a lot and is little better than Assassin's Creed. AI is not the best and I honestly think it's more of a way to vary gameplay than really well thought out mechanics.

Resources are 100% used for equipment upgrades and the persobalization of weapons and armor.

There are several skill trees that offer several options in the progression of Jin as Samurai or Shinobi.

Story seems to be simple and interesting, it does not have the narrative level of RDR2 and TLoU, but it is not the focus of the game and it seemed to be much better than the previous games of Sucker Punch.

Graphically it is one of the most beautiful games of this generation. It does not have the technical level of TLoU2 and RDR2 but it has an absurd art of beauty and according to my friend a wide variety of scenarios.
等緊

The catalyst for much of the recent Boogie hate came during a World of Warcraft Classic livestream in August of 2019. When responding to Twitch chat, he went on a several-minute tirade about his disgust for his detractors and his belief that sex offenders and white supremacists are more redeemable than his Internet trolls. Obviously, his comments were extremely inflammatory and nonsensical, but worse was his assertion that he would continue streaming in order to become a “martyr” to occupy these trolls so they don’t go on to bully other streamers in future. It was about as bad of a take as anyone in his position could possibly have had, and it majorly damaged his already-tarnished reputation.

replies.msg: 降低期望,當日本版刺客咁玩,OK嘅

玩完序章包膠

優點：
1. 劇情唔錯，有當年AC2味道，為咗復仇/拯救家園而改變自己、成長。
2. 場景畫面幾靚。
3. 打擊感唔錯，有斷肢斷頭。
4. 有裝備外靚換，而且design幾靚。
5. 最困難難度下，戰鬥有少少隻狼feel，完美格檔然後反擊、迴避反擊等等。敵人攻擊都唔算慢，攻擊頻率都高，而且中兩三刀就死。
6. 對歭拔刀斬慢鏡好撚正。

缺點：
1. 可能因為我係舊機PS4，某啲場景/過場有FPS drop，但整體影響不大。
2. 女角樣貌醜，唔好幻想會有Tifa陪住你。
3. 暫時招式唔多，玩落去應該會unlock新技能。
4. 序章Boss戰體驗一般，希望之後會好啲。

Overall:
個人感覺非常好，有武士feel，缺點瑕不掩瑜。鍾意武士/忍者嘅可考慮入手。

P.S. 向右輕掃手制中間塊長方板會收刀/拔刀，收刀狀態下撳正方可以玩拔刀斬。
向左輕掃會吹蕭，都幾有feel。

1. 劇情唔錯，有當年AC2味道，為咗復仇/拯救家園而改變自己、成長。
2. 場景畫面幾靚。
3. 打擊感唔錯，有斷肢斷頭。
4. 有裝備外靚換，而且design幾靚。
5. 最困難難度下，戰鬥有少少隻狼feel，完美格檔然後反擊、迴避反擊等等。敵人攻擊都唔算慢，攻擊頻率都高，而且中兩三刀就死。
6. 對歭拔刀斬慢鏡好撚正。

缺點：
1. 可能因為我係舊機PS4，某啲場景/過場有FPS drop，但整體影響不大。
2. 女角樣貌醜，唔好幻想會有Tifa陪住你。
3. 暫時招式唔多，玩落去應該會unlock新技能。
4. 序章Boss戰體驗一般，希望之後會好啲。

Overall:
個人感覺非常好，有武士feel，缺點瑕不掩瑜。鍾意武士/忍者嘅可考慮入手。

P.S. 向右輕掃手制中間塊長方板會收刀/拔刀，收刀狀態下撳正方可以玩拔刀斬。
向左輕掃會吹蕭，都幾有feel。
